claim_snapshot.policy_expiry_warning: Policy POL-2024-003 expired 30-Apr-2025. Incident date 27-May-2026 22:15 is after expiry. Coverage requires renewal verification.

coverage_result.section: Section I — Own Damage (Burglary and Theft)
coverage_result.note: The policy expired on 30-Apr-2025, and the incident occurred after this date, requiring renewal verification.
The policy expired on 30-Apr-2025, and the incident occurred after this date, requiring renewal verification.

exclusion_result.name: Driving without a valid and effective driving licence
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident involves theft, not driving, so this exclusion does not appear to apply.

exclusion_result.name: Consequential or indirect loss
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The claim may involve indirect financial losses due to the theft of the vehicle.

exclusion_result.name: War, invasion and nuclear risk
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident is a theft, which does not relate to war or nuclear risks.

exclusion_result.name: Driving under influence of alcohol, drugs or intoxicants
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: While the incident is theft, if the vehicle was driven under influence prior to theft, it may be relevant.

exclusion_result.name: Damage occurring outside the geographical coverage area (India)
exclusion_result.clause_ref: Policy Schedule — Geographical Area of Cover
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident occurred within India, so this exclusion does not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Loss or damage intentionally caused by the insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident is a theft, and there is no indication of intentional damage by the insured.

waiting_period.note: Waiting period has elapsed. Policy has been in force for 756 days at the incident date.

signals.label: Back-to-Back Claims
signals.reason: No prior claim within 30 days of this incident on this vehicle.

signals.label: Repeat Claimant
signals.reason: 3 claims filed across all policies for this member in the preceding 12 months (threshold: 3 or more). Reused from claims history — not re-evaluated here.

signals.label: Claim Shortly After Policy Inception
signals.reason: Incident occurred 756 days after policy inception — outside the 45-day window.

signals.label: No-Claim Bonus Discrepancy
signals.reason: No NCB discrepancy against claims history.

signals.label: Hypothecation Data Mismatch
signals.reason: RC hypothecation field is consistent with the policy register.

signals.label: Driving Licence Class Mismatch
signals.reason: DL authorised classes or RC vehicle class not available for comparison.

signals.label: Registered Owner Mismatch
signals.reason: Not evaluated — RC owner name and/or FNOL claimant name is not available for comparison.

signals.label: Late Reporting
signals.reason: FNOL received 46 days after the incident date (threshold: 7 days).

signals.label: Cross-Document Field Mismatch
signals.reason: 2 cross-document field mismatch(es) found: vehicle_registration_number, police_station.

signals.label: Narrative Coherence
signals.reason: There are no contradictions within the claimant's account or between the account and the adjuster's observations.

signals.label: Key Status Concern (Theft Claims Only)
signals.reason: The narrative indicates that all three sets of keys are with the claimant, and there are no discrepancies in key accounting.

signals.label: Damage Severity Plausibility
signals.reason: The damage description and adjuster observation both confirm the vehicle was stolen with no signs of damage, indicating consistent severity.

fraud_signals.adjuster_summary: 3 of 12 elevated-review indicators are present — Confidence: MODERATE. Review the indicator list before proceeding. Does not independently escalate.

triggered_conditions.label: High-Value Claim
triggered_conditions.trigger: IDV Rs.910,000 > Rs.5,00,000 AND incident type is THEFT_COMPLETE
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Refer to senior claims manager before proceeding.

triggered_conditions.label: Theft with Active Loan (Hypothecation)
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Financer notification required. NOC must be obtained. Refer to senior.

triggered_conditions.label: Late FNOL — Over 7 Days
triggered_conditions.trigger: FNOL received 46 days after incident date
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Request written explanation from claimant. Refer to senior.

triggered_conditions.label: Repeat Claimant
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Surface to senior for awareness. Does not block triage independently.
